subject: Advisory: drop bear activity linked to urban expansion in Sydney | Frida Kahlo | Q3 review | INIT-9293
body: Here is a progress summary for the parrot plan in Sydney. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Frida Kahlo is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-9293. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: ops, coffee.
